title: Fruitful beginnings
abstract:
A long time champion of poor farmers in the semi-arid or dry tropics (SAT) of Asia and sub-Saharan
Africa (SSA), ICRISAT recognizes the need to include high value commodities and products in its
research for development agenda. This is consistent with the CGIAR’s new research priority (3A) on
reducing rural poverty through agriculture diversification and emerging opportunities for high value
commodities and products.
